summary: Requirements mostly clear for mixed UI+API validation, but two business-rule ambiguities remain.

ambiguities.description: Exact qualifying deposit amount threshold is not explicit in ticket text.
ambiguities.impact: Could produce false fail if wrong threshold is tested.
ambiguities.resolution_needed: Confirm threshold with product owner or linked ticket.

ambiguities.description: Expected UI location for streak bonus (banner vs promotions list card) is not fixed.
ambiguities.impact: Could miss valid behavior variant in UI check.
ambiguities.resolution_needed: Confirm expected UI oracle from design or acceptance comment.

assumptions: QA environment has active streak campaign config
Prepared player can receive two qualifying deposits in sequence
open_questions: What exact minimum amount marks a qualifying deposit?
What is the canonical UI location for verification?
risks: environment drift may hide banner after cache delay
